description: Style Note Take edgy rugged dressing to the next level in these blue jeans from spykar. Perfect for casual outings, this pair looks great with grunge tees, jackets and leather boots. Product Details Blue jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has two side pockets with an insert pocket in the right pocket, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand badge appliqued on the waistband at the back and zipper and button closure on the front Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Machine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Tight fit low waist The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
